summary: Implemented immediate hotfix: disabled local-first compaction by default, switched normal work tiers to cloud-first compaction, preserved local retry/local-tier interception, and redacted transient pi-clipboard temp paths in local compaction prompt text. Added regression tests and updated lifecycle file scope.

constraints: Keep local compaction available for explicit local tiers and retry fallback after cloud failure.
Only redact transient pi-clipboard temp image paths; preserve ordinary repository file paths in compaction context.
